---
title: Constraining the Varied Response of Northern Hemisphere Winter Circulation
  Waviness to Climate Change
pagetitle: 2023-3-1-Nie2023 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2023
author: Yu Nie, Gang Chen, Jian Lu, Wenyu Zhou and Yang Zhang
venue: Geophysical Research Letters
venue_cit: <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 50, doi:10.1029/2022GL102150.
recommended_citation: 'Yu Nie, Gang Chen, Jian Lu, Wenyu Zhou and Yang Zhang, 2023:
  Constraining the Varied Response of Northern Hemisphere Winter Circulation Waviness
  to Climate Change, <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 50, doi:10.1029/2022GL102150.'
paper_url: https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1029/2022GL102150
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Constraining the Varied Response of Northern Hemisphere Winter Circulation Waviness to Climate Change

*Published in Geophysical Research Letters, 2023*

**Recommended citation:** Yu Nie, Gang Chen, Jian Lu, Wenyu Zhou and Yang Zhang, 2023: Constraining the Varied Response of Northern Hemisphere Winter Circulation Waviness to Climate Change, <i>Geophysical Research Letters</i>, 50, doi:10.1029/2022GL102150.

[Download paper](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1029/2022GL102150){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
